name: python3-pkg-resources
title: python3-pkg-resources
summary: Package Discovery and Resource Access using pkg_resources
description:
Package Discovery and Resource Access using pkg_resources
The pkg_resources module provides an API for Python libraries to
access their resource files, and for extensible applications and
frameworks to automatically discover plugins.  It also provides
runtime support for using C extensions that are inside zipfile-format
eggs, support for merging packages that have separately-distributed
modules or subpackages, and APIs for managing Python's current
"working set" of active packages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pkg-resources because Package Discovery and Resource Access using pkg_resources.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pkg-resources as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pkg-resources with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pkg-resources --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
